Metadata.homeTitle: Token-Forest — Let Your Tokens Grow Into a Tree
Metadata.homeDescription: Token-Forest is a desktop pet app: every token you spend with Claude Code or Codex becomes a floating bubble. Click to collect them and grow your pixel tree from seed to fruit-bearing apple tree. Local, offline, privacy first.

Footer.tagline: Turn your AI token spend into a growing pixel tree.

Hero.treeAlt: Token-Forest fully grown pixel apple tree
Hero.tagline: Let your AI tokens grow into a tree
Hero.body: Every token spent in Claude Code / Codex becomes a floating bubble — click to collect and watch your pixel tree slowly grow.

HowItWorks.heading: How It Works
HowItWorks.step01Body: Every time you write code with Claude Code or Codex, each token spent spawns a floating numbered bubble on your desktop.
HowItWorks.step02Body: Tap a bubble and your tree absorbs those tokens — with a tiny pop effect and a +NNN float label. Super satisfying.
HowItWorks.step03Body: Accumulated tokens drive the tree through 8 growth stages, from a tiny seed to a fruit-laden apple tree. Fully local, no network needed.
HowItWorks.privacyBody: Token-Forest only reads your local Claude Code / Codex usage logs. Completely offline — no data uploaded, no account needed, no internet required.

Features.heading: Features
Features.realtimeBullet0: Incrementally reads Claude Code & Codex usage logs
Features.realtimeBullet1: Bubbles appear the instant tokens are generated — zero lag
Features.growthBullet0: 8 pixel sprite stages, from seed to apple tree
Features.growthBullet1: Progress saved locally to garden.json — survives restarts
Features.privacyBullet0: Reads only local logs, sends no data
Features.privacyBullet1: No account, no network — fully offline
Features.taskbarBullet0: Pixel tree and soil float just above your taskbar
Features.taskbarBullet1: True desktop pet experience — doesn't block your workspace
Features.fruitsBody: Once your tree matures it grows fruit, ripened by token count and time. Harvest them, save them, trade them for cosmetics.
Features.shopBody: Spend fruit on pots, fairy lights, hats, fences, and more — layered onto your pixel tree to make it uniquely yours.
Features.seasonsBody: Auto-switches morning / dusk / night by system time, and spring / summer / autumn / winter by month — falling leaves, snow, blossoms.
Features.lbBody: Available now — turn it on in the desktop app settings. It only uploads your token total and a nickname, then you compare trees with players worldwide.

TreeShowcase.heading: Try Your Tree
TreeShowcase.caption: Click stage buttons to change growth · Toggle decorations · Click chest to open

Roadmap.heading: Coming Next
Roadmap.intro: Your tree already grows with every token you spend — these unlock next:
Roadmap.f1Desc: Once your tree matures it bears fruit — click to harvest it.
Roadmap.f2Desc: Spend harvested fruit on planters, string lights, hats, fences and more.
Roadmap.f3Desc: Your tree shifts with real time and season: day, dusk, night, spring to winter.
Roadmap.f4Desc: Frame animations, sound, more skins — polish is ongoing.

LeaderboardTeaser.heading: Whose Token Tree Is Tallest?
LeaderboardTeaser.body: Opt in to the global leaderboard — only your total token count and username are shared

DownloadCta.heading: Start Growing Your Tree
DownloadCta.body: Works on Windows · macOS · Linux. Free & open source — installed in one command.

LeaderboardPage.title: Leaderboard
LeaderboardPage.subtitle: Grow the mightiest tree with the tokens you spend
LeaderboardPage.emptyBody: Download the app and be the first to plant a tree
LeaderboardPage.howTo01Body: Visit the download page and run setup.ps1 (Windows) or setup.sh (macOS / Linux) to install.
LeaderboardPage.howTo02Body: Open the Token-Forest settings panel, enable 'Join Global Leaderboard', and agree to share only your total token count and username.
LeaderboardPage.howTo03Body: Enter your display name in settings. Your ranking will appear on the next sync. Privacy first — no other data is collected.

DownloadPage.heroBody: Every token you spend in Claude Code / Codex becomes a floating bubble on your desktop — click to collect and watch your pixel tree grow, blossom, and bear fruit.
DownloadPage.platformLine: Windows · macOS · Linux — free & open source
DownloadPage.petBody: A tiny plot of land hovering above your taskbar, home to a pixel tree that actually grows.
DownloadPage.visualBody: Every token Claude Code / Codex spends appears as a numbered bubble on your desktop.
DownloadPage.privacyBody: Reads local usage logs only. Fully offline — no data sent to any server.
DownloadPage.step01Body: Go to GitHub Releases and download the latest Token-Forest-win.zip, then extract to any folder.
DownloadPage.step02Body: Right-click and run as administrator, or execute in PowerShell:
DownloadPage.step02Note: The script automatically installs Python dependencies and creates a startup shortcut.
DownloadPage.step03Body: After installation, double-click the desktop shortcut or run from the extract folder:
DownloadPage.step03Note: When the tree appears above your taskbar, you're all set. Start coding and watch tokens bubble up.
DownloadPage.macLinuxBody: Extract, then run in terminal: bash setup.sh. Same startup process. Requires Python 3.10+.
DownloadPage.sysReq1: Python 3.10 or higher (the setup script will prompt if missing)
DownloadPage.sysReq2: Claude Code CLI or OpenAI Codex CLI (just needs usage logs generated)
DownloadPage.githubBody: Token-Forest is fully open source. Issues, PRs, and Stars are very welcome.
